query: Yes, my user ID is olivia_gonzalez_2305. Listing my current reservations would be helpful, thank you.

state.history_summary:

candidate_answers.text: Absolutely — I’ll pull up your account and list your current reservations so you can identify the one whose return flight you want to change.
The user explicitly wants the current reservations listed and has just reconfirmed the account identifier, so the grounded next move is to retrieve the user profile.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Use the later user turn where the traveler explicitly requests that current reservations be listed after reconfirming the user ID, because that makes account retrieval the clearest immediate action.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the decision-point state. Scores reflect which action most directly advances the user's request using only visible conversation evidence.
notes: query comes directly from the selected user message, not from task hidden fields
history_summary stops before any reservation list or reservation-detail outputs are shown
candidate_answers are manual non-leaky drafts grounded only in visible context
selected_message_index is 9 rather than 3 because the decisive request here is the explicit ask to list the current reservations
